mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_diagnosis_result ( circuit_id, frame_id, verdict, confidence ) VALUES ( #{circuitId}, #{frameId}, #{verdict}, #{confidence} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.panel_id, p.m_no FROM panel p INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = p.site_id INNER JOIN circuit c ON c.panel_id = p.panel_id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.m_no IS NOT NULL AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sensor_frame_circuit sfc INNER JOIN sensor_frame sf ON sf.frame_id = sfc.frame_id WHERE sfc.circuit_id = c.circuit_id AND sf.frame_id > COALESCE(( SELECT MAX(ai.frame_id) FROM ai_diagnosis_result ai WHERE ai.circuit_id = c.circuit_id ), 0) ) >= #{minSampleSize} ORDER BY p.panel_id ASC

SELECT c.circuit_id, c.channel_no, MAX(sf.frame_id) AS latest_frame_id FROM circuit c INNER JOIN sensor_frame_circuit sfc ON sfc.circuit_id = c.circuit_id INNER JOIN sensor_frame sf ON sf.frame_id = sfc.frame_id WHERE c.panel_id = #{panelId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND sf.frame_id > COALESCE(( SELECT MAX(ai.frame_id) FROM ai_diagnosis_result ai WHERE ai.circuit_id = c.circuit_id ), 0) GROUP BY c.circuit_id, c.channel_no HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minSampleSize} ORDER BY c.channel_no ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT latest.current_a AS am, latest.arc_counter AS `count` FROM ( SELECT sfc.current_a, sfc.arc_counter, sfc.reading_id FROM sensor_frame_circuit sfc WHERE sfc.circuit_id = #{circuitId} ORDER BY sfc.reading_id DESC LIMIT #{sampleSize} ) latest ORDER BY latest.reading_id ASC

SELECT result_id, circuit_id, frame_id, verdict, confidence, diagnosed_at FROM ai_diagnosis_result WHERE circuit_id = #{circuitId} ORDER BY diagnosed_at DESC, result_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
